title: First 100 Pages Revalidated — 90/100 Threshold Reality Check
change: Audited first 25 proposed loan pages against new 90/100 rubric. HONEST RESULT: 0 pass at 90.

audit_results.note: This is NOT a failure. This is the 90/100 gate working correctly. Most proposed pages are number-swap variants that don't pass the 'non-duplicate title/meta/body' and 'unique explanation' criteria at the required level.

root_cause: Number-swap variants (same template, different amount/rate/term) score 4-8 on 'non-duplicate' category
Template explanations (same structure, swapped numbers) score 4-8 on 'unique explanation'
Generic usefulness (just shows payment, lacks comparisons/warnings/context) scores 4-7
To hit 90: each page must have SUBSTANTIALLY unique explanation, rich context (comparisons, warnings, next steps), and clearly differentiated title/meta/body
what_this_means: We cannot mass-produce 100 pages. We must carefully build FEWER pages at higher quality.

revised_approach.quality_over_volume: Each page must be HAND-CRAFTED to hit 90+. Templates alone won't work.
how_to_hit_90: Each page must have a COMPLETELY unique explanation tied to the specific numbers
Add real-world context: 'At $405/month, this is about [X]% of median US income'
Add comparison table: same amount at different rates, same rate at different terms
Add warning section: 'With an 8% rate, you'll pay $4,332 in interest — that's 22% extra'
Add actionable next steps: 'To get an 8% rate, you typically need a credit score of...'
Each page must have AT LEAST 3 unique, specific elements not shared with sibling pages

sample_audited_pages.verdict: DRAFT — low explanation and usefulness scoring. Needs richer context.
DRAFT — generic scenario, no specific demand match. Template explanation issue.
DRAFT — similar issues to above. Template explanation + duplicate flag.

sample_audited_pages.demand: GSC: already getting 114 impressions for this query
sample_audited_pages.verdict: DRAFT (near 90) — Strongest candidate. Exact GSC match. Needs richer context to hit 90.

sample_audited_pages.demand: average rate scenario, related to GSC query
sample_audited_pages.verdict: DRAFT — number-swap risk. Too similar to 8% variant.
DRAFT — number-swap risk with 20K loan. Needs stronger differentiation.
DRAFT — weak demand evidence. Term change alone insufficient.

decision: DO NOT build the original 100-page batch. Rebuild 15-25 pages with hand-crafted quality targeting 90+.
